title: orthocarpus tolmiei
intro: Orthocarpus tolmiei, also known as Tolmie's orthocarpus, is a rare flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It is a hemiparasitic plant, meaning it obtains some of its nutrients by parasitizing the roots of other plants. The medicinal properties of Tolmie's orthocarpus include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are said to provide health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system.
